solved_parts_so_far: batch normalization can help reduce internal covariate shift

evidence_summary: Batch normalization can be used to stabilize deep neural network training by reducing internal covariate shift.

Layer normalization is a technique that can be used in recurrent architectures, which computes the mean and variance used for normalization from all of the summed inputs to the neurons in a layer on a single training case.
Gradient clipping and learning rate scheduling are not explicitly mentioned as methods for stabilizing deep neural network training in the provided evidence.
